Describe the sequence of surfing actions and text overlays visible throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a person lies prone paddling on a white surfboard in dark water; at 2s, the surfer rides a wave while text reading 'Huntington Beach' appears; at 8s, multiple surfers are visible as 'Created by Ricky G.' overlays the water; at 14s, a person rides a wave on a bodyboard instead of a surfboard.
